name: hud_sensor_register_mission_section_handlers
description: HudSensorTracker::RegisterMissionSectionHandlers registers the Mission and MissionLate ZBD section handlers with their save/restore callbacks, sort order, and tracker userdata.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?RegisterMissionSectionHandlers@HudSensorTracker@@QAEXXZ at 0x417640 still fails: 58 unmasked mismatches, 26 relocation bytes masked, 4 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 54 bytes, VC object symbol size 96 bytes.

Reviewed difference is callback-address coercion: current source routes callback pointers through ZbdCallbackPtr helper calls, while the original emitted direct callback and string addresses into zUtil_ZAR::RegisterSectionHandler.
The native smoke verifies both registered sections, sort order, callback presence, userdata identity, and list/count insertion.
